articles.title: Bright lights and hot orbs: UFO files shed light on sightings but leave interpretation to the public
articles.summary: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper.

en.title: Bright lights and hot orbs: UFO files shed light on sightings but leave interpretation to the public
en.summary: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper.

de.title: Helle Lichter und heiße Kugeln: UFO-Akten geben Aufschluss über Sichtungen, überlassen die Interpretation jedoch der Öffentlichkeit
de.summary: Am 8. Mai 2026 veröffentlichte das US-Kriegsministerium seinen ersten Stapel freigegebener UAP-Datensätze und startete damit das öffentliche Archiv PURSUE, das nach Angaben der Trump-Regierung alle paar Wochen aktualisiert wird. Die Veröffentlichung folgt einer Anweisung von Präsident Trump vom 19. Februar 2026, die Bundesbehörden anweist, Dokumente im Zusammenhang mit außerirdischem Leben und UAP zu identifizieren, zu überprüfen und freizugeben. Sie umfasst Dutzende von Behörden und Dutzende Millionen Aufzeichnungen, viele davon nur auf Papier.

de.title: Helle Lichter und heiße Kugeln: UFO-Akten geben Aufschluss über Sichtungen, überlassen die Interpretation jedoch der Öffentlichkeit
de.summary: Eine nationale UFO-Datenbank listet mehr als 100 Berichte von Einwohnern und Reisenden von Longmont auf, in denen Metallkugeln, dreieckige und winkelförmige Fahrzeuge, orangefarbene Lichter, grüne Feuerbälle und andere ungewöhnliche Objekte über der Stadt beschrieben werden. „Frühere Berichte stammen aus dem Jahr 1998, als eine Familie ein großes dreieckiges Flugzeug in der Nähe des Flughafens sah, und aus dem Jahr 1999, als aus einem Fenster ein untertassenförmiges Objekt mit blinkenden Lichtern beobachtet wurde.

articles.title: UAP whistleblower: Pilots are 'still having' these encounters
articles.summary: Former Navy F‑18 pilot Ryan Graves, who has identified himself as a whistleblower on unidentified aerial phenomena, appeared on Fox News’s “The Big Weekend Show.” He discussed the Pentagon’s release of UFO and UAP footage. Graves said that pilots are still having encounters.

de.title: UAP-Whistleblower: Piloten haben diese Begegnungen „immer noch“.
de.summary: Der ehemalige Navy-F-18-Pilot Ryan Graves, der sich selbst als Whistleblower zu unbekannten Luftphänomenen identifiziert hat, trat in der „The Big Weekend Show“ von Fox News auf. Er besprach die Veröffentlichung von UFO- und UAP-Aufnahmen durch das Pentagon. Graves sagte, dass Piloten immer noch Begegnungen hätten.

articles.title: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna Frames UFO Disclosure Through The Book of Enoch As A Window Into A Reality Beyond Human Perception
articles.summary: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, a Florida congresswoman, publicly linked the ongoing UFO disclosure debate to themes in the Book of Enoch, suggesting a possible connection between unidentified aerial phenomena and ancient narratives about heavenly beings. Luna’s remarks were framed within the interdimensional hypothesis and Carl Sagan’s Flatland analogy, which posit that beings from other dimensions may appear to us in ways that defy conventional physics.

en.title: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna Frames UFO Disclosure Through The Book of Enoch As A Window Into A Reality Beyond Human Perception
en.summary: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, a Florida congresswoman, publicly linked the ongoing UFO disclosure debate to themes in the Book of Enoch, suggesting a possible connection between unidentified aerial phenomena and ancient narratives about heavenly beings. Luna’s remarks were framed within the interdimensional hypothesis and Carl Sagan’s Flatland analogy, which posit that beings from other dimensions may appear to us in ways that defy conventional physics.

de.title: Die Abgeordnete Anna Paulina Luna stellt die UFO-Enthüllung anhand des Buches Henoch als Fenster in eine Realität dar, die jenseits der menschlichen Wahrnehmung liegt
de.summary: Die Abgeordnete Anna Paulina Luna, eine Kongressabgeordnete aus Florida, brachte die laufende Debatte über die Enthüllung von UFOs öffentlich mit Themen im Buch Henoch in Verbindung und deutete einen möglichen Zusammenhang zwischen unbekannten Luftphänomenen und alten Erzählungen über himmlische Wesen an. Lunas Bemerkungen wurden in die interdimensionale Hypothese und Carl Sagans Flatland-Analogie eingebettet, die davon ausgehen, dass Wesen aus anderen Dimensionen uns auf eine Weise erscheinen könnten, die der konventionellen Physik widerspricht.

summaries.file-release-bright-lights-and-hot-orbs-: On May 8, 2026 the US Department of War released its first batch of declassified UAP records, launching the public archive PURSUE, which the Trump administration says will be updated every few weeks. The release follows a February 19, 2026 directive from President Trump instructing federal agencies to identify, review and declassify documents related to extraterrestrial life and UAP, and includes dozens of agencies and tens of millions of records, many only on paper. The first tranche focuses on cases where the government cannot definitively determine the nature of the phenomena and contains Apollo 12 and 17 imagery, a cockpit transcript describing bright particles, FBI infrared images of unidentified objects over the western US in 2025, and military reports from incidents in the UAE, Greece, the Middle East, Africa, Japan, and North America. FBI Director Kash Patel said his agency handed over its first batch of classified UAP documents to the Pentagon‑led inter‑agency committee, while Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and DNI Tulsi Gabbard framed the release as evidence of the administration’s commitment to transparency and a joint declassification effort. The Department of War notes that many unresolved cases reflect insufficient data rather than anomalous capability, invites private‑sector analysis, and that the initiative’s success will depend on whether future tranches provide new operational detail rather than additional Apollo‑era curiosities and short infrared clips.
summaries.film-how-to-watch-sleeping-dog-online-st: "Sleeping Dog" is a UFO documentary directed by Michael Lazovsky that follows investigative journalist Jeremy Corbell and includes eight new, unreleased videos from U.S. military sensors. The film features interviews with insiders such as astronaut Dr. Edgar Mitchell, Colonel John B. Alexander, John Lear, Bob Lazar, David Grusch, nuclear
summaries.sighting-bright-lights-and-hot-orbs-ufo-: A national UFO database lists more than 100 reports from Longmont residents and travelers describing metallic spheres, triangular and chevron‑shaped craft, orange lights, green fireballs, and other unusual objects over the city. Recent entries include a March 25 2025 sighting of a hovering metallic sphere that lasted about 20 minutes, an October 14 2025 dark triangular craft with white lights and a muted hum, and a January 27 2026 silver chevron‑shaped object that was classified by NUFORC as “Aircraft — Probable.” Earlier reports date back to 1998, when a family saw a large triangular craft near the airport, and 1999, when a saucer‑shaped object with flashing lights was observed from a window. The database notes that many sightings could be explained by aircraft, satellites, drones, weather balloons, or optical effects, and that NUFORC includes cautionary notes or possible explanations for each case. The reports provide a public record of what witnesses said they saw, but they do not constitute official confirmation of extraterrestrial activity, and no definitive conclusion has been reached.
summaries.uap-whistleblower-pilots-are-still-havin: Former Navy F‑18 pilot Ryan Graves, who has identified himself as a whistleblower on unidentified aerial phenomena, appeared on Fox News’s “The Big Weekend Show.” He discussed the Pentagon’s release of UFO and UAP footage. Graves said that pilots are still having encounters.
summaries.uap-whistleblower-david-grusch-on-non-hu: David Grusch served 14 years in the U.S. Air Force, reaching the rank of Major and completing a combat tour in Afghanistan. He later held senior intelligence positions at the National Geospatial‑Intelligence Agency and the National Reconnaissance Office, and represented the latter on the UAP Task Force from 2019 to 2021. In 2022, Grusch filed a whistleblower complaint that was described as credible and urgent. In 2023, he testified before Congress, claiming that parts of the U.S. government had blocked congressional oversight, withheld information from executive officials, and illegally concealed programs related to the recovery and reverse engineering of craft of unknown, non‑human origin.
summaries.sighting-rep-anna-paulina-luna-frames-uf: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, a Florida congresswoman, publicly linked the ongoing UFO disclosure debate to themes in the Book of Enoch, suggesting a possible connection between unidentified aerial phenomena and ancient narratives about heavenly beings. Luna’s remarks were framed within the interdimensional hypothesis and Carl Sagan’s Flatland analogy, which posit that beings from other dimensions may appear to us in ways that defy conventional physics. The article notes that NASA and the Department of Defense have documented UAP sightings that exhibit sudden acceleration, seamless trans‑medium travel, and behavior inconsistent with known propulsion systems. While Luna draws structural parallels between the Watchers of the Book of Enoch and interdimensional entities, the piece stresses that no verified evidence links UAPs to the ancient text’s described beings. The discussion now extends beyond technology and national security to broader questions of reality and perception, with the article emphasizing that the explanatory value of these connections will depend on future evidence.

scanMeta.summaryPolicy: Only article-content summaries are app-eligible; metadata/headline fallback text is rejected later by summary_quality_gate.py.

de.title: Die Abgeordnete Anna Paulina Luna stellt die UFO-Enthüllung anhand des Buches Henoch als Fenster in eine Realität dar, die jenseits der menschlichen Wahrnehmung liegt
de.summary: Die Abgeordnete Anna Paulina Luna, eine Kongressabgeordnete aus Florida, brachte die laufende Debatte über die Enthüllung von UFOs öffentlich mit Themen im Buch Henoch in Verbindung und deutete einen möglichen Zusammenhang zwischen unbekannten Luftphänomenen und alten Erzählungen über himmlische Wesen an. Lunas Bemerkungen wurden in die interdimensionale Hypothese und Carl Sagans Flatland-Analogie eingebettet, die davon ausgehen, dass Wesen aus anderen Dimensionen uns auf eine Weise erscheinen könnten, die der konventionellen Physik widerspricht.
